title: METHODS OF TEACHING ENGLISH AS A FOREIGN LANGUAGE IN PRESCHOOL EDUCATION
author: Rustamov, Ilyos Alisher o'g'li
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this article, the author provides information about the methodology of teaching foreign languages in preschool education including English. Furthermore, we can observe different methods of teaching English language in foreign countries and their tactics to apply it in practice.
steps_raw: In this article, the author provides information about the methodology of teaching foreign languages in preschool education including English. Furthermore, we can observe different methods of teaching English language in foreign countries and their tactics to apply it in practice.
keywords: Preschool education, methodology, method, English language, "Game" method, "Doman" method, "Communicative" method.
